site.title: Sonic Pixels
site.intro: A field of pixels that listens to the music.

tracks.title: Pulse Garden
tracks.description: A warm, mid-tempo loop — gentle kicks and a pentatonic melody that makes the lower rows bloom. Placeholder track; replace in content.json.

tracks.title: Soft Circuit
tracks.description: Brighter and a touch faster, with swung hats lighting up the top rows. Placeholder track; swap your own audio into /public/media.

tracks.title: Low Tide
tracks.description: Slow and mellow — deep bass that settles the field into a calm pulse. Placeholder track for demonstrating the reactive visuals.

visuals.title: Tile Study 01
visuals.description: Placeholder visual. Drop an image or video into /public/media and describe it here.

visuals.title: Tile Study 02
visuals.description: Placeholder visual. Supports images and video — set "type": "video" for clips.

visuals.title: Field Sketch
visuals.description: Placeholder visual showing the warm tile palette in motion.

visuals.title: Grid Bloom
visuals.description: Placeholder visual — a soft pulse blooming from the centre of the grid.

visuals.title: Warm Static
visuals.description: Placeholder visual exploring the resting pattern of the field.

visuals.title: Resting Pattern
visuals.description: Placeholder visual. Replace with your own work via content.json.

builds.title: Sonic Pixels
builds.description: This site. A single audio-reactive Three.js scene where a field of solid-colour tiles listens to whatever's playing.

builds.title: Tile Engine
builds.description: Placeholder build. The instanced-mesh renderer behind the pixel field — describe a real project here.

builds.title: Frequency Tuner
builds.description: Placeholder build. The radio-band navigation component. Swap in your own project and link.

builds.title: Studio Tools
builds.description: Placeholder build. A spot for an internal tool or experiment. Add or remove builds by editing content.json.

contact.intro: Available for multimedia projects and web development
